# Iris Dataset Project

This project explores the classic Iris dataset through a clean, reproducible workflow.  
It includes an exploratory data analysis, a polished article, and the original notebook.

## Contents

- [Read the article](iris.html)
- [Download the notebook](../assets/notebooks/iris.ipynb){:download="iris.ipynb"}

## Overview

The goal of this project is to demonstrate clear insights, structured analysis, and a reproducible workflow.  
It covers:

- data exploration and visualization  
- feature relationships  
- class separability  
- interpretation of patterns
